content.en:
After taking away the Forbidden Stone Tablet, Ye Tian did not stay here, but left here quickly, and was not ready to continue exploring.

After all, if it falls, this replica body is not tight, but the taboo stone tablet will be lost!

Therefore, he had to go out first and send this forbidden stone tablet to the main body before he could really feel at ease.

Ye Tian returned the original way, did not encounter any accidents during the period, and flew out of the passage where he came in very safely.

Silent and unnoticed by any taboo zerg.

When Ye Tian flew out of the forbidden zerg nest and kept moving away from this area, he was truly relieved.

------------

"It's back!"

Ye Tian stepped onto the ground of the Black Wind Mountain base, and his mood was very refreshing.

At this moment, Ye Tian no longer had a forbidden talent hidden, for fear of attracting the attention of the two half-step domain ancestors, he didn't want to expose this forbidden talent of his at the moment.

Ye Tian casually cast a stealth secret technique, and then came to his mansion and sent the forbidden stone tablet into the hands of the main body.

"Yes, the Forbidden Stone Tablet is in hand, and with this Forbidden Stone Tablet, it will be much easier for me to comprehend the Forbidden Dao in the future. At present, my perception of the Endless Forbidden Dao is still too little, and I guess I haven't even reached the entrance, but I have only initially comprehended the complete Forbidden Dao. If I take the Endless Forbidden Dao as an entry, I have only mastered the Endless Forbidden Dao by about 0.3% now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, Ye Tian let the copy body leave and continued to act as the Dark King.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian stayed in the incarnation of the human race and entered the Wind Mountain to look for information about the dark blunt gold vein, but unfortunately there was too little information about this aspect, and there was no information about the dark blunt gold and the forbidden Zerg lair at all.

Helpless, he had no choice but to give up.

Of course, he could also look for the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor to ask for relevant information, and report the information of the Dark Blunt Gold Vein, but in this way, he didn't dare to guarantee that the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor would not have bad intentions.

After all, the value of that Dark Blunt Gold Vein was too high, if the Eternal Dao Ancestor didn't have too many bad intentions and had the means to take away the Dark Blunt Gold, I'm afraid he wouldn't give him too much Dark Blunt Gold.

People are selfish!

Ye Tian was no exception, he didn't want to share too much Dark Blunt Gold with the Eternal Dao Ancestor for them, so he didn't ask.

What's more, Ye Tian has a more suitable candidate to ask.

"Ouyang Jiu'er!"

Ouyang Jiu'er used to be a half-step domain ancestor, he had seen a lot, and his identity was very unusual, so it should be possible to know some information about the Dark Blunt Gold Vein, and maybe there was a way to take away the Dark Blunt Gold Vein.

Based on the relationship between him and Ouyang Jiu'er, she believed that Ouyang Jiu'er would never cheat him.

Before, Ye Tian had not contacted Ouyang Jiu'er, for fear of disturbing Ouyang Jiu'er.

But this time, he had no choice but to summon Ouyang Jiu'er.

Ye Tian's incarnation spread the message within the human race, but he couldn't be contacted.

"Could it be that Ouyang Jiu'er is in the Dark Forbidden Domain?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If it is in the Dark Forbidden Domain, ordinary communication treasures are useless, and you can only use a special taboo communicator, but if Ouyang Jiu'er is really in a certain base in the Dark Forbidden Domain, he doesn't have Ouyang Jiu'er's forbidden communicator in his hand, so there is no way to contact her.

However, Ye Tian also has a way.

He used his copying talent to probe the situation of one base after another, and with his ability to copy talent, even if he practiced in the secret room and opened layers of formations, he could easily detect the other party's talent.

Therefore, as long as Ouyang Jiu'er stayed at a certain base, he could find the other party.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded the Black Wind Mountain base, but he didn't find the other party, this is normal, after all, the Black Wind Mountain base is basically the Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, and Ouyang Jiu'er naturally won't come here.

Immediately.

Ye Tian went to other bases, in the name of visiting, so he did not arouse the suspicion of other bases.

One by one, the bases were visited by Ye Tian, but no trace of Ouyang Jiu'er was found.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Jiuhe Base, one of the scattered cultivation bases, which was a base established by the Jiuhe Dao Ancestor, one of the invincible Dao Ancestors of the Scattered Cultivation, and there were many Dao Ancestors stationed here, but the level was not too high.

After Ye Tian came to this base, he used his copying talent to envelop the entire base.

"Hey, I found it!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

......

Nine Rivers Base, a mansion.

Ye Tian came here, passed on the sound and went in, to visit the master here.

Soon, a black-faced man came out, and the aura on the other party's body was a supreme Dao ancestor.

Seeing this black-faced man, Ye Tian smiled and said, "Jiu'er, how are you doing?"

The black-faced man's eyes widened, and he said incredulously: "Brother Ye, I have become like this, do you recognize me?"

Subsequently, the black-faced man invited Ye Tian into the mansion.

Wow!

The black-faced man lifted his disguise and turned into a woman, it was Ouyang Jiu'er.

"Brother Ye, have you put any position on me, what I used is a supreme secret treasure, a supreme treasure in my previous life, even if it is an invincible Dao Ancestor or a half-step domain ancestor, there is no way to see through my disguise!" Ouyang Jiu'er said curiously.

Ye Tian coughed and explained: "I will have a talent, this talent is a forbidden talent, and you can ignore all disguises!"

"Forbidden Talent !!"

Ouyang Jiu'er was extremely surprised.

She believed it, after all, only the forbidden talent was so rebellious.

Suddenly, she envied Ye Tian's forbidden talent.

"Brother Ye, what are you looking for me?" Ouyang Jiu'er asked curiously.

She knew that Ye Tian would not come to her if she was fine, and she was still looking for her everywhere, so she found her in the Jiuhe base.

"I've found a vein of dark blunt gold!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

"Really?" Ouyang Jiu'er's eyes widened again.

"Really!" Ye Tian affirmed: "And the vein is still very large, and the value is incalculable!"

"Is there no way to get rid of it, that's why you came to me?"

Ouyang Jiu'er said with a roll of his eyes.

"Yes!" Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Just ask you, this favor, can you help, once the matter is done, give you half of the ore vein, how about it?"

"!"

Ouyang Jiu'er nodded.

Half of the dark blunt gold of the vein, how much is it worth, she only needs to help, and she can get it, this is a free deal!

"Where is the vein? Why can't you take it, tell me more about it. "

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Dark Blunt Gold Veins ...... Inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair"

Before Ye Tian finished speaking, Ouyang Jiu'er hurriedly said: "Brother Ye, I think it's still important to live a little bit, so I won't take this vein!"
